name: Monster: Ultra Rosa
desc: Eh, not so bad. Tastes like an saturated version of strawberry dreams and i can rock with this tbh.

name: Monster: Pacific Punch
desc: This is the BOMBOCLAT type shit i fucking needed. Really good taste and hits u instantly, amazing way to start the day.

name: Monster: Aussie Lemonade
desc: It sure tastes like lemonade! Not really exactly like lemonade but close enough for me not to care as much about otherwise its pretty good.

name: Monster
desc: Ah yes the original battery acid energy drink, surprisingly after a while not a bad taste but i wish there was more to this.

name: Monster: Super Dry
desc: Its worse than even the OG Monster. Doesnt help i spent 2x prices cuz this was imported and it was at circle k B(

name: Monster: VR|46
desc: Its kinda just there? im not a huge fan of the flavor but i wouldnt be mad that someone got me this. idk not my favorite.

name: Monster: Pipeline Punch
desc: Its kinda ass, surprisingly worse than the strawberry monster but meh luckily i see it less in my stores so ig most ppl agree with me that this is a bit on the shit side.

name: White Monster
desc: The femboy's most beloved drink. tbh kinda ass but its not exactly aiming for having a taste (or a lighter citrucy flavor depending on how u view it) so its nice to mix with other flavory drinks.

name: Monster: Khaotic
desc: Good alternative when i kinda dont want a mango loco tbh. Very creative taste and not much else i can say here lol.

name: Monster: Mango loco
desc: Honestly my go to if i can get it. Great way to start my day and not complain abt shit with this monster being The Shit™.

name: Monster: Lando Norris
desc: This is what the OG black monster shouldve been imo, its not uniquely full of taste but it is more enjoyable and id buy this over the OG monster any day of the week. (oh and also the textured can is neat touch even if it requires more work to make)

name: Monster: Strawberry Dreams
desc: Ah yes one of the many pink monsters out there, tbh one of my more favorite drinks out there surprisingly tastes like the color (colour for the brits) but that might just be strawberries tasting pink in general ig.

name: Monster: Golden Pineapple
desc: Also known as Ultra gold (for some reason?), idk branding is weird. Doesnt rlly hit as hard and the pineapple taste only comes through when you drank atleast 25% of the drink so idk seems lame tbh. prob wont buy this.

name: Saaremaa Vesi: Sidrunimaitseline nõrgalt gaseeritud joogivesi
Monster: Rio Punch
desc: This makes me feel a certain way like sldjkfhsjkdfghdfs. This is one of my most favorite and probably one of the best flavors its so goooood. It kinda tastes like tutti frutti and some other flavor that i dont know but makes my tongue and brain go oooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooh.

name: Monster: Bad Apple
desc: Honestly idc what anni fucking says this shit rocks. Tastes very similarly to apple juice (its in the name) but carbonated and caffeine (my beloved). If u like apples then this is a solid pick.
